subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Thou Who quickeneth the hearts through the breathings of the Holy Spirit, the fragrances of the All-Merciful's gardens, and the gentle breezes of the divine gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا محیی القلوب بنفثات روح القدس و نفحات ریاض الرحمن و نسائم حدائق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power of prayer, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
